name: Ghostwriting As A Career Crash Course
author: Ghostwriting Academy (anonymous)
patterns: Practice on yourself: whatever service you sell, build a version for yourself first as your primary case study
1-1-1 Rule: 1 specific problem × 1 specific type of person × 1 specific way — differentiation creates pricing power
Call yourself something different to escape commoditization (freelance writer → ghostwriter maps to agency → AI Ops)
Free Work Pitch: front-load a 20-min deliverable before the sales ask — show don't tell
5 Voice Archetypes: Storyteller, Opinionater (Hedger/Better), Fact Presenter, Frameworker, F-Bomb Dropper
Pricing Level framework: Per Word → Per Hour → Per Month → Per Asset (sweet spot) → Per Outcome
Educational Email Courses: 70% opt-in rate = best ghostwriting offer for 2026
3 client acquisition channels: word-of-mouth, warm lead (own audience), cold outreach (DM/email) — sales > writing skill
2 ways to scale: horizontal (1 service × many clients) or vertical (many services × 1 client)
Cold outreach pitch: diagnose specific problem → offer specific fix outline → let the work sell itself
notes: Positioning framework, not a direct competitor. Highest steal: practice-on-yourself principle (we implement this turn), 1-1-1 Rule (already baked into Nebula's ICP trigger model), pricing level validation for per-asset $97 fix pack.
actions_taken: Ran Nebula's own audit tool on nebulacomponents.shop — score: 6.8/10 B
Fixed critical SEO gaps: title tag trimmed to 55 chars, meta description to 156, removed duplicate tags
Added self-audit case study page at /case-studies/self-audit.html
Added "We audit ourselves too" link to index.html testimonials section with score
